_meta.note: Mixed cooking-appliance DB: ranges (slide-in/freestanding), wall ovens, cooktops. Fuel: induction is the major 2025-26 trend (DOE rebates up to $840). gas | electric | induction | dual_fuel. Yale 2026 reliability: induction service rates higher than gas due to electronics complexity. Output BTU for gas burners; wattage for induction.
_meta.spec_backfill_2026_05: Round 1 spec backfill 2026-05-05 — oven_capacity / burners / max_burner / convection / air_fry / self_clean / wifi / msrp verified from manufacturer spec sheets. Each backfilled model gets a ratings.source_urls.specs entry citing the source. ~5 records updated this round.
_meta.honesty_pass: Unverified rating fields nulled on 2026-04-24. Numeric scores (cr_overall, reviewed, rtings, yale_reliability_pct, etc.) will be repopulated as they are confirmed against primary sources; source URLs will be added to ratings.source_urls.
_meta.endorsements_pass_2026_05: Endorsements arrays added 2026-05-05 to 19 top-tier models — Reviewed.com best-of, Yale Appliance, and individual-review citations.
_meta.review_data_pass_2: Round 2 review-data pass 2026-05-05: 7 models received Yale Appliance reliability data and/or Reviewed.com roundup endorsements.
_meta.added_models_pass_3: Added GE JGB735SPSS as a Wirecutter / Yale top affordable gas range pick on 2026-05-05.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_2026_05: Round 7 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 2 retailer-rating entries added across top-tier models. Each entry is the live rating + count from the retailer URL on the same date.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_2_2026_05: Round 8 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 3 additional retailer-rating entries added.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_3_2026_05: Round 9 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 1 additional retailer-rating entries.
_meta.yale_36inch_pass_2026_05: Round 13 backfill 2026-05-05: 3 models received Yale 2026 'Best 36-inch Induction Range' endorsement.
_meta.wirecutter_pass_2026_05: Round 14 Wirecutter backfill 2026-05-05: 9 models tagged with Wirecutter pick status + endorsement. Source: full Wirecutter articles for fridges, dishwashers, electric ranges, gas ranges, counter-depth fridges (all updated Feb–Apr 2026).
_meta.wirecutter_additions_2026_05: Round 15: added 5 Wirecutter-picked models that were missing from the DB. Sources: Wirecutter Best Electric Stoves (Oct 3 2025) + Best Gas Stoves (Mar 20 2026).
_meta.reviewed_individual_pass_2026_05: Round 16: 7 models received Reviewed.com individual-review URL endorsements (verified via site:reviewed.com search).
_meta.yale_brand_endorsement_pass_2026_05: Round 17: 46 0-source models received a Yale Appliance brand-article endorsement so the brand-level reliability data has a citable surface on the card.
_meta.last_zero_source_pass_2026_05: Round 18: cleared the last 3 zero-source models with Yale citations.
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_2026_05: Round 22: 16 models had their generic CR buying-guide URL upgraded to the model-specific CR review URL.
_meta.popular_missing_pass_2026_05: Round 25: added 1 popular missing models (Bosch SHEM63W55N, GE GNE25JSKSS, etc.) sourced from retailer-rating searches.
_meta.cleanup_pass_2026_05: Round 27 cleanup: removed 1 models added in round 25 that failed the "buyable today" rule (PHS930SLSS is discontinued; PHS930YPFS is the current model and is already in the DB).
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_2_2026_05: Round 28: 5 more CR model-specific review URLs (existing in-DB models, not new entries).
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_3_2026_05: Round 29: 6 more CR model-specific review URLs (existing in-DB models only).
_meta.cooktop_pass_2026_05: Round 30: high-CR cooktops — 6 model-specific CR URLs upgraded, 4 Best Buy retailer ratings added.
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_4_2026_05: Round 32: 0 more CR model-specific review URLs.

models.name: Thermador Pro Harmony Liberty 30" Induction Range

pros: Liberty freeform cooktop — pot placement anywhere across 56 inductors

Pro Harmony aesthetic with adjustable color touchscreen

4.4 cf oven smaller than mainstream 30" induction (LG 6.3 cf, Samsung 6.3 cf)

models.name: JennAir RISE 30" Induction Professional-Style Range

endorsements.label: Yale 2026: JennAir — Whirlpool's luxury division; shares manufacturing with KitchenAid

pros: Flex-Choice induction zones (two separate elements or one large surface)
Culinary Center remote access via WiFi
cons: 4.1 cf oven typical of pro-style (smaller than slide-in equivalents)
Two-year limited warranty short for the tier

models.name: JennAir RISE 36" Induction Professional-Style Range

endorsements.label: Yale 2026: JennAir — Whirlpool's luxury division; shares manufacturing with KitchenAid

pros: Flex-Choice induction zones with Assisted Cooking presets
Halo-Effect knobs + edge-to-edge black glass cooktop
cons: $15k MSRP enters Wolf/Miele territory without their reliability track record

models.name: Wolf 30" Transitional Induction Range

endorsements.label: Yale 2025: Wolf — "great post-sales support… keeps parts for decades, in many cases back to 2001"

pros: Bridge function joins zones for griddles, fish poachers, oblong cookware
10 cooking modes including Gourmet (~50 presets), Stone, Proof, Dehydrate
Dual VertiFlow convection for even multi-rack baking
cons: Transitional styling has less pro-look than IR36551
$9.9k MSRP — Wolf premium without independent Yale reliability data

models.name: Wolf 36" Professional Induction Range

endorsements.label: Yale 2026: 'Best for bakers who want power and consistency.' Top 36-inch induction for baking.

pros: New 5500W boost zone for fastest boil times in class
Pro red knobs + iconic Wolf design
cons: Pro-styling requires kitchen built around it

models.name: GE JGB735SPSS 30" Freestanding Gas Range w/ Convection + Air Fry

endorsements.label: Wirecutter: 'best looks and build quality of any affordable gas range we found'
Yale 2026: 'If your priority is reliability and fast service, start here.' — 4.8% service rate, the most reliable mainstream gas range
Reviewed.com individual review — GE JGB735SPSS
Wirecutter (Mar 2026): "former top pick" — still cited as having "best looks and build quality of any affordable gas range"

pros: 18,000 BTU power burner + center oval burner (5th burner perfect for griddle)
Edge-to-edge cast-iron grates separate into 3 parts — dishwasher safe
Wirecutter top affordable pick + Yale most-reliable gas range (4.8%)
cons: Single-fan convection (true convection has dual fans)

models.name: Hotpoint RBS160DM 5.0 cu ft Coil-Top Electric Range (Wirecutter buy-it-for-life)

endorsements.label: Best Buy-It-For-Life Range (Electric) 2026: "fully mechanical… components can often be replaced easily without a repair person… extra sturdy with a metal body designed to hold up to heavy-duty long-term use."

pros: Wirecutter Buy-It-For-Life pick — designed to last decades
All mechanical — no digital boards to fail
ENERGY STAR certified + eligible for federal electric appliance rebates
Lift-up coil cooktop for easy underneath cleaning
cons: Coil cooktop heats slower than smoothtop (2,400W vs 3,000W on glass-ceramic)
No oven window or interior light

models.name: GE Profile PB965 30" Double-Oven Electric Range (Wirecutter best double-oven)

endorsements.label: Best for Double Oven (Electric) 2026: "strongest power burner of any freestanding radiant-electric range we've seen… 4.4 cubic-foot lower oven is bigger than those of most double-oven models available."

pros: Wirecutter Best Double-Oven Electric — 3,600W power burner is class-leading
4.4 cu ft lower oven fits a 23-pound turkey
Auto-syncs with GE Appliances range hood via Wi-Fi
Five-element flex-width cooktop with bridge zone for griddles
cons: No storage drawer (lower oven takes that space)
Only the lower oven has true convection

models.name: GE Profile PGB935 30" Gas Range w/ 20,000 BTU power burner (Wirecutter upgrade)

endorsements.label: Upgrade Pick (Gas) 2026: "strongest power burner I've seen (20,000 Btu)… large, true convection oven and a reversible griddle… best cooktop of any model I evaluated."

pros: Wirecutter Upgrade Pick (Gas) — 20,000 BTU power burner is class-leading
True convection 5.6 cu ft oven (largest of Wirecutter's gas picks)
Three oven racks (most picks include only two)
Wi-Fi via SmartHQ for remote start, Scan-To-Cook, software upgrades
cons: Doesn't auto-sync with range hood (Wirecutter notes the electric double-oven version does)

models.name: Whirlpool WFG320M0M 5.1 cu ft Gas Range w/ continuous grates (Wirecutter budget gas)

endorsements.label: Budget Pick (Gas) 2026: "especially good functionality and quality for the price… two large 15,000 Btu burners… continuous cast iron grates (uncommon at this price)"

pros: Wirecutter Budget Gas Pick — two 15,000 BTU power burners (high for the price)
Continuous cast iron grates (rare in budget gas)
cons: Broiler in bottom drawer (no storage drawer)
Grates separate into only 2 pieces — heavier to clean

models.name: Hotpoint RGBS300DM 4.8 cu ft Gas Range (Wirecutter buy-it-for-life gas)

endorsements.label: Best Buy-It-For-Life Range (Gas) 2026: "all manual and all mechanical, with components that can often be replaced easily without needing a repair person… designed with a sturdy metal body to hold up to heavy-duty long-term use."

pros: Wirecutter Buy-It-For-Life Gas pick — designed for decades-long service life
All mechanical, no digital boards to fail
Sealed burners protect gas jets from spills
cons: 13,000 BTU large element (vs 15,000-20,000 on other picks)
No convection, no oven window, no interior light
Broiler in bottom drawer (no storage drawer)
